task: Add a $100 Best Buy gift card for a birthday to my cart.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully added a $100 Best Buy gift card to the cart and verified it in the cart. Evidence: on the product page for 'Best Buy® - $100 Celebrate Balloons Gift Card' (Best Buy URL ending /sku/6632820), the page showed price $100.00 and an 'Add to cart' button. After clicking it, the cart count changed from 3 to 4 items. The final cart page at https://www.bestbuy.com/cart explicitly lists 'Best Buy® - $100 Celebrate Balloons Gift Card' with quantity 1 and price $100.00. Although the exact design is 'Celebrate Balloons' rather than explicitly 'Birthday,' it is a reasonable birthday-themed/celebration gift card and satisfies the task intent.
final_result_response: Done. I added the $100 Best Buy Celebrate Balloons gift card to your cart. Your cart now has 4 items.
action_history: Opening Best Buy: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/');
Opening Gift Cards section: await page.locator('e19').click();
Searching for birthday Best Buy gift card: await page.locator('e8').fill('Best Buy birthday gift card $100');
Searching for birthday Best Buy gift card: await page.locator('e9').click();
Filtering for Best Buy birthday gift cards at $100: await page.locator('e67').click();
Opening birthday-style Best Buy gift card options: await page.locator('e174').click();
Checking more denominations for the Celebrate Balloons card: await page.locator('e236').click();
Checking for the $100 denomination: await page.locator('e236').click();
Opening a $100 birthday Best Buy gift card product: await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/product/best-buy-100-birthday-pixel-gift-card/JCQ6H96WCF/sku/6349569');
Opening $100 Celebrate Balloons Best Buy gift card: await page.locator('e66').click();
Adding gift card to cart: await page.locator('e49').click();
